name: UI Action
description: Open UI, close UI, or show a toast message.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## UI Action

Open UI, close UI, or show a toast message.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | Action | `enum` | `toast` | `Open UI` (`open_ui`), `Close UI` (`close_ui`), `Toast` (`toast`) |
| `uiTargetId` | UI Element ID | `string` | `` | - |
| `message` | Message | `string` | `` | - |
| `toastType` | Toast Type | `enum` | `info` | `Info` (`info`), `Success` (`success`), `Warning` (`warning`), `Error` (`error`) |
